$comment: ASTROLAB FIELD — the engine-agnostic control surface. hands (or any future input) WRITE the Field; sound, visuals, worlds READ it. This file is the single source of truth shared by the web instrument (hands.js), the OSC relay (td-bridge.js), and any reader (Unity/OscJack, TouchDesigner). Bump `version` on any breaking change.

websocket.note: browser -> relay (the browser cannot speak UDP/OSC)

osc.note: the relay (td-bridge.js) forwards every numeric channel below as one OSC float message per name

v.desc: schema version of this Field frame (matches `version` above)

pitch.desc: position within the active scale (left..right of the playing hand)

intensity.desc: body / presence / loudness (closer to camera = more)

stillness.desc: derived: how settled the hand is

union.desc: two hands brought together -> binaural entrainment

pinch.desc: thumb + index together -> a summoned star

twist.desc: wrist rotation (in-plane) -> timbre / chorus / glyph spin

bloom.desc: transient: a release or chord change -> reverb / shimmer swell

body.desc: transient: a rhythmic onset -> low body thump

register.desc: octave shift in semitones from a pose (e.g. thumb-up = +12)

beat.desc: binaural beat frequency (Hz); apart = fast, together = theta

tempo.desc: seconds between rhythmic onsets (the hand's pulse)

chordVoices.desc: number of voices in the current chord = sides of the chord glyph (1=point, 2=line, 3=triangle, 4=square)

melody.desc: melody mode active (left fist pedals, right hand strikes in-key)

chordMode.desc: chord mode active (hand position plays a full diatonic chord)

keysMode.desc: air-piano active (each fingertip strikes a note on a downward jab)

strike.desc: transient: a fingertip just struck a note (decays each frame) -> visual flash

strikeX.desc: horizontal position of the last strike (0=left .. 1=right) -> where to flash

temple.desc: healing mode (deeper breath + resolution, dimmer, warmer)

frozen.desc: Hold engaged (the pad is held instead of gliding)

tuning.note: the instrument is tuned to A=432
